positive: A majestic, stylized mountain silhouette at sunset, dominated by clean, crisp geometric lines and layered peaks. In the foreground, a simplified, abstract constellation of shooting stars and a crescent moon are visible. The sky gradient transitions from deep indigo near the zenith to burnt orange and gold near the horizon. Use a limited color palette of indigo, burnt orange, deep teal, and stark white. The style should be modern geometric illustration, high contrast, suitable for vinyl printing on dark apparel, with ample negative space and strong central composition. Minimalist, detailed engraving style.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, gradients in people, messy lines, cartoonish, realism, photographic
